feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Error during ADT Installation because of missing
entry.content:
Dear Community Members,

I am writing to you with a very basic issue but whatever I try it does not seem to be resolved.
Whenever I try to install ADT via the URL listed in the installation guide (link below) I receive the following error:

Cannot complete the install because one or more required items could not be found.

Software being installed: ABAP Business Object Tools (Developer Edition) 1.183.0 (com.sap.adt.tools.bopf.devedition.feature.group 1.183.0)

Missing requirement: BOPF Business Object Plug-in 1.183.0 (com.sap.adt.bopf.businessobject 1.183.0) requires 'osgi.bundle; org.eclipse.emf.workspace [1.6.0,2.0.0)' but it could not be found

Cannot satisfy dependency:

From: ABAP Business Object Tools (Developer Edition) 1.183.0 (com.sap.adt.tools.bopf.devedition.feature.group 1.183.0)

To: org.eclipse.equinox.p2.iu; com.sap.adt.tools.bopf.feature.group [1.183.0,1.183.0]

Cannot satisfy dependency:

From: BOPF Business Object Tools 1.183.0 (com.sap.adt.tools.bopf.feature.group 1.183.0)

To: org.eclipse.equinox.p2.iu; com.sap.adt.bopf.businessobject [1.183.0,1.183.0]

Link to installation guide:  Download the Eclipse IDE and add the ABAP Development Tools (ADT) Plugin | SAP Tutorials
I even tried to solve the issue by removing the bundled JustJRE from eclipse and altering the eclipse.ini file as described in the relevant note.
JDK 24 is installed as well.

Sap Relase S/HANA 2020 FPS01
Client OS: Windows 11 Enterprise
Eclipse and ADT both latest releases

Thank you for your help in advance!

Best Regards,
Tamas

entry.title: API to create Inbound Delivery with reference to PO
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to use the API - API_INBOUND_DELIVERY_SRV/A_InbDeliveryHeader to create the inbound delivery with reference to a Purchase Order. I am using the following Json in the Gateway client.

But, I get the following error in the log.

Appreciate any inputs on what I am doing wrong here.

entry.title: Gross price calculation in ME23n
entry.content:
Is there any function or calculation that returns the gross price by item displayed in ME23n?

I need to display this in a report based on the 'PO' number.

I tried to go through konv, but I can't get the exact value of the gross price like ME23n

Thanks

entry.title: Intermittent Http_Communication_Failure Error in ABAP Using IF_HTTP_CLIENT->receive
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am intermittently encountering the exception Http_Communication_Failure in my ABAP code when using the method IF_HTTP_CLIENT->receive to send data to external systems (in my case, SAP CPI).

Upon analyzing the short dump, I noticed the following error message:
Connect to hostaddress:443 failed: NIECONN_REFUSED (-10),
and the system variable ME->M_ECODE has the value 411.

Has anyone experienced a similar issue or have any suggestions on how to resolve this?

Thanks in advance,
Ravi Bharti

entry.title: Custom Field not Appear in LSMW and BDC
entry.content:
Hello Team,

In C202, we have two custom fields. I am using LSMW and BDC for recording. That custom fields not appear in both LSMW & BDC.

How to record that customer fields.

entry.title: How do I debug the INSERT, UPDATE table syntax?I'm getting sy-subrc = 4.
entry.content:
I was trying to use Insert, Update on updating a table.

I was trying to insert and update 4 different fields.

When Inserting into table named Z_LOCAL, only 3 fields were inserted even though 4 fields were expected  to be inserted.

INSERT Z_LOCAL FROM TABLE LT_ZLOCAL_INSERT.

And when updating, i'm getting sy-subrc = 4.

UPDATE Z_LOCAL FROM TABLE LT_ZLOCAL_UPDATE.

entry.title: EXIT_SAPLL03A_005 stock removal strategy is overwritten by FIFO
entry.content:
Hi gurus,

I m looking for some support in regards to:

  • Function Module: EXIT_SAPLL03A_005
  • Include Program: ZXLTOU07

I have requested developer to build custom stock removal strategy which would work 2 ways:

Objective

Develop a custom stock removal strategy in SAP Warehouse Management (WM) using the enhancement MWMTO004 (Function Module EXIT_SAPLL03A_005) to:

  1. Primary Goal: Pick the full required quantity from a single bin if available.
  1. Fallback Logic: If no single bin contains the full quantity, apply the standard FIFO strategy to pick stock from multiple bins based on the oldest goods receipt date.

And here we run into the problem after code debug it looks like it is working, but after TR is converted to TO it looks like it applies standard fifo strategy. I have parameters set in prog par, under storage type level stock removal strategy is set to F with user exit check active.

T_QMAT looks correct in this case it picked from the right bin because logic is met.

My question is do we use the right exit ? or we miss some FM to create TO. Code below all we got.

 

Code example:

  DATA:
    lv_enh_applicable TYPE abap_bool VALUE abap_false.

  zdovista_par=>get_prog_par_multi( EXPORTING ip_programm = 'ZXLTOU07'
                                              ip_par      = 'USER_EXIT'
                                    IMPORTING et_value    = DATA(lt_lgnum_lgtyp) ).
  LOOP AT lt_lgnum_lgtyp INTO DATA(ls_param).
    SPLIT ls_param-value AT ';' INTO DATA(lv_lgnum) DATA(lv_lgtyp).
    IF i_ltap-lgnum = lv_lgnum AND
        i_ltap-vltyp = lv_lgtyp.
      lv_enh_applicable = abap_true.
      EXIT.
    ENDIF.
  ENDLOOP.
  "1. Check for Full Quantity in a Single Bin
  IF lv_enh_applicable = abap_true.
    LOOP AT t_qmat ASSIGNING <ls_qmat>
                   WHERE verme >= i_anfme."i_ltap-vsola.
      <ls_qmat>-ausme = i_anfme."i_ltap-vsola
      LOOP AT t_qmat ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<ls_qmat_others>)
                   WHERE lgnum <> <ls_qmat>-lgnum AND
                         lqnum <> <ls_qmat>-lqnum.
        CLEAR: <ls_qmat_others>-ausme.
      ENDLOOP.
      EXIT.
    ENDLOOP.

    "2. Fallback to FIFO Strategy
    IF sy-subrc <> 0.
      SORT t_qmat BY wdatu ASCENDING.
      DATA(lv_remaining_qty) = i_anfme."i_ltap-vsola.

      LOOP AT t_qmat ASSIGNING <ls_qmat>.
        IF <ls_qmat>-verme >= lv_remaining_qty.
          <ls_qmat>-ausme = lv_remaining_qty.
          EXIT.
        ELSE.
          <ls_qmat>-ausme = <ls_qmat>-verme.
          lv_remaining_qty = lv_remaining_qty - <ls_qmat>-verme.
        ENDIF.
      ENDLOOP.
    ENDIF.
  ENDIF.

entry.title: Save Purchase Requisition as DRAFT from ME51N.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I got this requirement to add option to save PR as DRAFT  from ME51N.

I could see the tile 'Purchase Requisition - Professional' has the option to save as draft button.

Requirement:

The user should be able to save the PR as draft and then retrieve it and make changes in it.
Also, is there an option to see the attachment in the ME51N screen while the PR creation itself?

We have already made a Z version of the Tcode so we can't just use the professional tile, we need the feature to be add in the ME51N itself. Also, I tried using the hold feature - but it's more like a document in hold, right?

How can I get this requirement done? Any comments would be of great help.

entry.title: ADT rename exception class bug "Error when replacing ZCL_XXX====CS. Details: parameter previous..."
entry.content:
In Eclipse 2025-03 / ADT 3.48.3 / backend ABAP 7.58, I'm renaming an exception class, I get this error:

Error when replacing ZCL_XXX====CS. Details: parameter previous end >= next start: [476,52] >= [476.26]

The referred code is:

    IF sy-subrc <> 0.
      RAISE EXCEPTION NEW zcx_xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx( iv_texte = 'xxxxxxxxxx'(001) ).
    ENDIF.

No fix found in SAP notes.

Thanks.

Sandra

entry.title: ADT 3.48 bug - Delete and Ctrl-Z keys are deactivated after Ctrl-F (Find/Replace) used. Workaround?
entry.content:
After I use Ctrl-F to find or replace any text in an ABAP source code, the Delete key doesn't delete any more.

Hopefully I can use the backspace key but that's quite annoying.

Ctrl-Z is also deactivated.

Any nice workaround to get them back?

Thanks.

Sandra

Version: Eclipse 2025-03 / ADT 3.48

entry.title: Issue with Programmatically Assigning Catalogs to Sections in SAP Fiori Launchpad
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I’m encountering an issue while trying to streamline the creation and assignment of spaces, pages, sections, and catalogs in the SAP Fiori Launchpad.

Problem Description:

The client requires the creation of more than 1000 spaces, pages, and sections, with the need to assign already existing catalogs to the sections of the pages. I’ve already:

  • Configured all necessary settings and roles.

  • Tested the entire process manually, including creating one space, one page, one section, and assigning catalogs through the Fiori Launchpad Designer.

Manually, the configuration works perfectly. I can display the assigned catalog in the Fiori Launchpad, and everything functions as expected.

Challenge:

The SAP Fiori Launchpad Designer only allows creating and assigning these components one by one, which is not feasible for such a large volume.

Solution Attempted:

To handle this in bulk, I’ve developed an ABAP program in the Workbench that:

  1. Imports data from a .txt file.

  2. Programmatically generates spaces, pages, and sections.

  3. Handles the assignments:

    • Pages to spaces

    • Sections to pages

    • Catalogs to sections

The program updates the relevant tables, including:

  • /UI2/PGSEC, /UI2/PGHEADC, /UI2/PGSECAIC, /UI2/PGHEADCT, /UI2/PGSECAITIC

  • /UI2/PGSECC, /UI2/PGSECCT, /UI2/STHEADCT, /UI2/STHEADC, /UI2/STPGAC.

Upon verifying in the Fiori Launchpad Designer:

  • The catalogs appear as assigned to the sections.

  • However, when I click on the catalog in the Launchpad, nothing is displayed.

If I manually assign the same catalog to the same page and section via the Launchpad Designer, it works perfectly.

Question:

Has anyone faced a similar issue? Is there an additional table or configuration step I might have missed when handling this process programmatically? Any insights or suggestions would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: New ABAP application with complex HMI
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I need to develop an ABAP program (in SAP ECC EHP8) that has a user interface component that's complicated or even impossible to implement in SAP GUI.

So, in 2025, what alternatives do I have to SAP GUI? I need a long-term solution; of course, the GUI component will be decoupled from the backend component.

I don't think I can develop a Fiori application in my environment. Developing a SAPUI5 application (technical constraints, difficulty)?

Is WebDynpro technology still a viable solution? I'm afraid not.

Or, for greater flexibility, would I need to develop an external application (in C#) connected to SAP?

I look forward to hearing your opinion.

entry.title: So10 Underline single word for Adobe Forms
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am working with SAP Adobe Forms, 

I have a longer so10 object and it was a couple words I would like to underline and let show in Adobe Forms, 

is there a way to do this? 

Thanks in advanve

entry.title: Extended Withholding Tax: exclusion strategy steps
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I want to get programmatically the steps defined in an exclusion strategy for withholding tax code. Customization is via SPRO->Financial Accounting->Financial Accounting Global Settings->Withholding tax->Extended withholding tax->Calculation->Define Exclusions.

I found there is view V_WITH_EXCL_STR but from there somehow I need to navigate in an ABAP program to the steps defined in customization so as to determine whether a G/L account is included in a range in a derivation rule.

Is there any function module or other standard way to retrieve the steps defined in an exclusion strategy for withholding tax?

Thanks in advance,

Konstantinos

entry.title: Report Editor's (se38) allowing creating only local objects
entry.content:
In SAP ABAP Report Editor (SE38), I'm currently only able to create local objects. When I attempt to save a modification and create a transport request, I receive the following message:

"You can include objects of this type in a local Workbench request only."

Is there any configuration or setting that needs to be adjusted in order to allow transportable (non-local) requests?

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Unable to create a C1 release contract on CDS Table Function
entry.content:
To access certain data, we have implemented a CDS Table Function in a Standard ABAP/Tier 2 package, which we would then need to be consumed by a Tier 1/Cloud for ABAP CDS View.

(We are following the recommendation here: Creating Tier 2 Cloud APIs).

However, in ADT the options to add a C1 or C2 release contract are greyed out / unavailable for the CDS Table Function:

Also, when trying to add a C0 release contract, it gives this message: "C0 release is not supported for entity type F.":

Trying to consume the CDS Table Function in a Tier 1 CDS View is impossible, and also results in an error (presumably until we can add a C1 release contract).

entry.title: how to analyze ATC result for the S4 variant for the conversion
entry.content:
Hello All - 

We have Ran the ATC on SAPBasis central system 7.2 and over ECC environment against the variant - SAP S4 Hana readiness 2023. 

the file was uploaded to the SAP readiness check report ... is there a way we can get automatic s4 simplification fix that can performed thru ADT ( eclipse) ? can we do the same with the SAP GUI in S4..

 

thansks

aakash

entry.title: consuming SOAP CPI services from S4HANA or Payroll via certified x509 authentication
entry.content:
Currently we have established a SOAP Web service from CPI which is consumed from Sap Payroll, it is required to perform the authentication through the X509 certificate. 

Web Service

SOAMANAGER

Ping

The process that has been done so far is to export the CPI CA certificates to the STRUST in SAP Payroll and in the same way the export of the SAP Payroll own certificate to SAP CPI.

I would like to know if I have to perform any additional process for the authentication of the service through X509 Certificate.

entry.title: OBPM4: '&SYSID&' Placeholder Not Replaced in Payment File Path at Runtime
entry.content:
OBPM4 Payment File Path Issue: '&SYSID&' Placeholder Not Replaced in Outbound Path

 

Hello Experts,

We are facing an issue in our production environment with the OBPM4 configuration for Payment medium generation.

Issue:

The placeholder '&SYSID&' is not being replaced by the actual system ID (e.g. PR1) during runtime.

#We are not sure if:

  • The replacement of &SYSID& depends on a logical file path configuration?
  • The Variant was incorrectly transported with ‘&SYSID&’ instead of the actual system-specific value?
  • Any custom logic or missing setting is preventing the substitution?

    #What we have checked:

    • OBPM4 configuration and variant setup.
    • The path value in SE38 – variant.
    • The file is being generated, but with the placeholder as – is ('&SYSID&') in the path.

      Could you please guide on what to check further or how to solve this issue?

      Any help or documentation reference would be appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Error running step by step to generate ABAP Flight Reference Scenario tables
entry.content:
Hello community, I am following this tutorial: https://github.com/SAP-samples/abap-platform-refscen-flight/blob/ABAP-platform-2019/README.md to generate ABAP Flight Reference Scenario tables, but when executing F9 in the /DMO/CL_FLIGHT_DATA_GENERATOR class to fill the tables, the error appears: Class does not implement if_oo_adt_classrun~main method!

Does anyone know why and how to solve the problem?

Thanks
